hero.title: Sovereign AI Inference, Run in Europe
hero.lead: Helexa is an AI inference platform designed for sovereign European AI deployment — running advanced models efficiently on commodity and workstation-class hardware, without hyperscale datacenters or massive GPU clusters.
hero.subcopy: For European businesses that need to run AI locally — for regulatory, privacy, and cost reasons.

intent.title: Why Helexa Exists
intent.p1: Today's AI infrastructure assumes hyperscale datacenters and massive GPU clusters. European businesses increasingly need to run AI locally — for regulatory, privacy, and cost reasons — but existing inference stacks are optimised for very different environments.
intent.p2Intro: Helexa is built for the infrastructure Europe actually has:
intent.bullet1: Advanced models running efficiently on commodity and workstation-class hardware.
intent.bullet2: Data residency and privacy by default — inference stays on infrastructure you control.
intent.bullet3: Lower infrastructure requirements, without sacrificing performance.
intent.bullet4: Independence from a small group of foreign hyperscalers.
intent.closing: Not a US cloud with an EU region — a software layer for sovereign European AI deployment.

whyNow.title: Why Now
whyNow.problemBullet1: Today's inference stacks assume hyperscale datacenters and large GPU clusters.
whyNow.problemBullet2: European regulation — GDPR, the AI Act, sectoral rules — pushes workloads on-premise and in-region.
whyNow.problemBullet3: Sending data to foreign clouds is a regulatory, privacy, and cost liability.
whyNow.problemBullet4: Cloud GPU access is expensive, supply-constrained, and governed elsewhere.
whyNow.problemBullet5: Capable commodity and workstation hardware already sits underused across Europe.
whyNow.opportunityIntro: Near-frontier open-weight models now run well on hardware Europe already owns.
whyNow.opportunityBullet1: Advanced models run on single workstations and commodity GPUs — no cluster required.
whyNow.opportunityBullet2: European businesses want AI they can run locally, under their own control.
whyNow.opportunityBullet3: Operators with capable hardware can serve inference close to users.
whyNow.opportunityBullet4: Regulation is turning data sovereignty from a preference into a requirement.
whyNow.opportunityBullet5: Efficient inference software is the missing layer — not more datacenters.

operators.title: Run advanced models on your own hardware.
operators.body: Helexa serves near-frontier open-weight models on commodity and workstation-class GPUs — on-premise, in your own jurisdiction. No cluster, no hyperscaler, no offshore dependency. Data stays where you control it.

routing.title: Requests stay close to home.
routing.body: Helexa routes each request to infrastructure with capacity, preferring region affinity — so traffic and data stay where you expect. Deployments compose into a wider network as capacity grows.

value.title: Work is proven. Economics are transparent.
value.body: Usage is metered transparently and independent operators are compensated for the intelligence they serve. No platform taxation, no opaque billing, no lock-in.

distributed.title: Sovereign by Design
distributed.body: European hardware, European operators, European law. No single point of failure and no foreign control plane your access depends on.

participation.title: Runs on Hardware You Have
participation.body: From a single workstation to a regional datacenter, capable compute can run helexa — reducing infrastructure requirements rather than demanding new clusters.

fairness.title: Privacy & Transparency
fairness.body: Privacy-native: chat history lives only in the browser, never on a server. Usage metering is transparent; there are no black boxes and no hidden fees.

evolving.title: Resilient by Distribution
evolving.body: Capacity spread across many independent deployments is harder to censor, throttle, or switch off — and resilient to foreign policy shifts and single-vendor failure.

roadAhead.title: Where Helexa Is Going
roadAhead.p1: Our long-term goal is to become the software layer powering a distributed network of independently operated European AI infrastructure.
roadAhead.p2: From enterprise deployments running advanced models on their own hardware, to renewable-powered regional datacenters serving their communities.
roadAhead.p3: A European inference layer owned and operated in Europe — resilient to outages, foreign policy shifts, monopolies, and single-vendor failure.
roadAhead.p4: Infrastructure that strengthens European autonomy instead of deepening dependency on a handful of foreign providers.

card.title: The software layer for European AI infrastructure
card.body: Helexa is early, and deliberately so — a working inference stack today, growing toward a distributed network of independently operated European deployments.

joinMesh.title: Sovereign AI Infrastructure.
joinMesh.lead: Whether you run AI on your own hardware, operate capacity, or are building toward European AI sovereignty, there is a place for you here.
joinMesh.footer: No walled gardens. No foreign owner. A software layer for sovereign European AI — from a single workstation to renewable-powered regional datacenters.
